seed_instruction: Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise.
org_constraint: The keyword "raise" must appear in the first sentence.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "raise" in the email.
instruction: Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise. The keyword "raise" must appear in the first sentence. Avoid using the keyword "raise" in the email.

Subject: Compensation Review Discussion

Dear [Manager's Name],

I am writing to formally request a raise based on my performance record. Over the past year, my contributions have consistently aligned with company goals. Consequently, I believe my current compensation should reflect this added value. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss this matter at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Compensation Review Discussion

Dear [Manager's Name],

I am writing to formally request a raise based on my performance record. Over the past year, my contributions have consistently aligned with company goals. Consequently, I believe my current compensation should reflect this added value. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss this matter at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
